name: Motor (Async Python MongoDB Driver)

auth.notes: MongoDB auth (username/password, X.509, SCRAM) via connection string

performance.notes: Async non-blocking; connection pool managed automatically

agent_readiness.notes: Async MongoDB driver for Python (asyncio). client = AsyncIOMotorClient(uri). db = client.mydb. collection = db.mycollection. await collection.insert_one({'key': 'value'}). await collection.find_one({'key': 'value'}). Cursor iteration: async for doc in collection.find(). Aggregation pipeline. Indexes. Change streams (streaming). GridFS. Same API as PyMongo but async. Required for FastAPI/Starlette/Tornado MongoDB access. Beanie ODM wraps Motor.

gotchas: Must use AsyncIOMotorClient in async context (not regular pymongo)
Change streams require replica set or MongoDB Atlas
Cursor must be consumed async (async for or await .to_list())
Thread safety different from PyMongo — don't share client across threads
best_when: FastAPI or Starlette apps using MongoDB
Async Python services needing non-blocking MongoDB I/O
Direct MongoDB access when Beanie ODM too heavy
Change stream consumers in async applications
avoid_when: When Beanie ODM provides better data modeling experience
Complex relational data (use PostgreSQL with asyncpg)
summary: Motor is MongoDB's async Python driver for asyncio-based frameworks. AsyncIOMotorClient for async/await MongoDB access. await collection.find_one(), insert_one(), update_one(). Async cursor iteration. Change streams. GridFS. Same API as PyMongo but non-blocking. Required for FastAPI/Starlette MongoDB. Beanie ODM wraps Motor for model-based access.
